declare.add_lieu_name_error: Name must be at least 3 characters.

declare.error_date: Please choose a date for the prayer.
declare.error_name_body: Please enter the deceased's name, or enable "Stay anonymous".
declare.import_hint: Only PNG and JPG files are accepted.

declare.import_format_body: Only PNG and JPG files are accepted.
declare.import_login_required: You must be logged in to import a janaza.

declare.import_error_generic: An error occurred during the import.
declare.import_timeout: Request timed out. Check your declarations later.
declare.import_image_quality: The image is too blurry or unreadable. Please provide a clearer photo so the AI can read the mosque address.
declare.import_verify_body:
The AI has extracted the information from the flyer. It is not perfect — please check that all the information is correct.

To make changes, go to Declaration History in your profile.
declare.import_verify_time_unknown: ⚠️ The prayer time is set to 00:00 — the AI could not extract this information. Please enter it manually.

map.info_body:
This tab shows mosques, funerary homes and other prayer places within the radius defined in your profile.

The Map tab shows all prayer places where janazas are scheduled, regardless of distance.

Are you sure you want to delete your account? ⚠️ This action is irreversible.

All your data will be permanently deleted: your profile, declarations and subscriptions.

You will not be able to recover your account.

prayer.title: Salat al-Janaza
prayer.subtitle: 4 takbirat
prayer.takbir_1_intro: Mentally pronounce the intention (niyya) to pray Salat al-Janaza, then raise your hands to shoulder level and say:
prayer.takbir_2_title: 2nd Takbir — Salat upon the Prophet ﷺ
prayer.takbir_2_intro: Pronounce the second takbir without raising your hands, then recite Salat Ibrahimiyya:
prayer.takbir_3_intro: Pronounce the third takbir, then invoke Allah for the deceased:
prayer.takbir_3_for_woman: For a woman (replace لَهُ with لَهَا):
prayer.takbir_3_note: This dua is from the authentic hadith reported by Muslim (963).
prayer.takbir_4_intro: Pronounce the fourth and final takbir, then a short invocation before concluding:
prayer.tip_1: Salat al-Janaza is prayed standing, without ruku' or sujud.
prayer.tip_2: There is no minimum number of rows required, but praying in rows is recommended.
prayer.tip_3: It can be prayed at any time of day, except during prohibited times.
prayer.tip_4: The coffin must be placed in front of the imam. For a man, the imam stands facing his head.
prayer.merits_subtitle: The funeral prayer brings spiritual benefits to both the deceased and the participants.
prayer.merit_1_body: The Prophet ﷺ said: "There is no Muslim who dies and forty men who do not associate anything with Allah stand to pray over him, except that Allah grants their intercession for him." (Reported by Muslim in his Sahih, no. 948) The more participants, the more effective the intercession is considered. This is why it is recommended to widely announce the death.
prayer.merit_2_body: The Prophet ﷺ said: "Whoever attends the Janaza until the prayer is offered will have a Qirat of reward, and whoever attends until the burial will have two Qirats." It was asked: "What are the two Qirats?" He replied: "Like two great mountains." (Reported by Al-Bukhari in his Sahih, no. 1325, and Muslim in his Sahih, no. 945) This immense reward highlights the importance Islam places on accompanying the deceased.
prayer.merit_3_body: Attending a Janaza is a powerful reminder of our own mortality, an act that softens the heart and leads to repentance (التَّوْبَة) and self-improvement. The Prophet ﷺ said: "Increase your remembrance of the destroyer of pleasures: death." (Reported by At-Tirmidhi, no. 2307, and Ibn Majah, no. 4258 — Hasan hadith)
prayer.fatiha_fr: In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful. Praise be to Allah, Lord of all the worlds. The Most Gracious, the Most Merciful. Master of the Day of Judgment. You alone we worship, and You alone we ask for help. Guide us to the straight path, the path of those whom You have blessed, not of those who have earned anger, nor of those who have gone astray.
prayer.salat_ibrahimiyya_fr: O Allah, send Your blessings upon Muhammad and the family of Muhammad, as You sent Your blessings upon Ibrahim and the family of Ibrahim. You are indeed Praiseworthy, Glorious. O Allah, bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad, as You blessed Ibrahim and the family of Ibrahim. You are indeed Praiseworthy, Glorious.
prayer.dua_man_fr: O Allah, forgive him, have mercy on him, preserve him and pardon him. Honor his welcome and expand his entrance. Wash him with water, snow and hail, and purify him of his sins as You purify a white garment of filth. Replace for him his home with a better home, his family with a better family, and his spouse with a better spouse. Admit him to Paradise and protect him from the punishment of the grave and the punishment of the Fire.
prayer.dua_woman_note: (Same supplication replacing all masculine pronouns with feminine ones.)
prayer.dua_final_fr: O Allah, do not deprive us of his reward, do not put us to trial after him, and forgive us and him.
prayer.salam_fr: May the peace and mercy of Allah be upon you.

contact.intro: A question, suggestion or problem? Write to us, we will respond as soon as possible.

onboarding.step1_subtitle: Never miss a funeral prayer again
onboarding.step1_description: "Salat Janaza" connects you to mosques in your area and notifies you of funeral prayers in real time.
onboarding.step2_description: We use your location to display nearby mosques and send you relevant notifications.
onboarding.step3_description: Receive a notification as soon as a funeral prayer is declared in your radius or on your route.
